task_completion.description: Verifies that the agent successfully logged into the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard or logged-in interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verifies that a new Nutrition Plan named 'Nutritionist Protocol' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A nutrition plan with the exact name 'Nutritionist Protocol' is visible in the wger nutrition plans list or detail view.

task_completion.description: Verifies that Rolled Oats and Whole Milk were added with correct weights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nutrition plan shows Rolled Oats (80g) and Whole Milk (250g) added to a meal.

task_completion.description: Verifies that Chicken Breast, Brown Rice, and Broccoli were added with correct weights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nutrition plan shows Chicken Breast (Raw) (200g), Brown Rice (150g), and Broccoli (100g) added to a meal.

task_completion.description: Verifies that Beef Steak and Sweet Potato were added with correct weights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nutrition plan shows Beef Steak (250g) and Sweet Potato (200g) added to a meal.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the wger web interface to input the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the wger web interface being interacted with (e.g., forms for adding meals and ingredients).

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually opened and read the PDF file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A PDF viewer or browser tab displaying the nutrition_protocol.pdf document is visible in at least one screenshot.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show commands interacting directly with the wger database or running scripts to insert data.
